human_review_rules: Flashpoint must confirm project type, margin, repeat potential, and proof/case-study permission.
workflows.success_condition: Current revenue is tagged well enough to decide what to sell first.

human_review_rules: Do not treat a signal as real unless source, date, and why-it-matters are captured.
Use kill patterns to avoid generic market research noise.
workflows.success_condition: Each researched account has a profile, signal stack, and recommended next action.

human_review_rules: Founder-assisted routes require manual review before outreach.
High-urgency accounts need a proof asset attached before copy generation.
workflows.success_condition: Each account has an ICP score, urgency score, evidence, and recommended route.

human_review_rules: No prospect-facing copy unless score is 85+ and hard fail flags are empty.
workflows.success_condition: Copy is entity-correct, source-grounded, and ready for human review.
